_about: Curator hand-overrides applied on top of the automatic selection. track_pick forces an exact Discogs tracklist title (token-matched; enrich.py); video_pick forces a specific YouTube id (assemble.py, highest precedence); video_note adds a factual note.

track_pick.61: Pump Up The Music (Girly Girly Mix)
track_pick.62: You're No Good For Me (Classy Club Dub Mix)
